message:
test(scheduler): add 20 stress/fairness E2E tests (bd-13iit)

Parametric multi-worker contention (2, 4, 8 workers), per-worker
PreemptionMetrics breakdown, continuous injection during execution,
deterministic reproducibility across multiple limits and task counts,
timed-lane EDF under cancel pressure, imbalanced workloads, single-lane
isolation (cancel-only, timed-only, ready-only), staggered wave injection,
shutdown drain, detailed single-worker interleaving, and 10K-task stress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
